---
metadata-files:
    - mock/step.yaml
    - nano/step.yaml
    - bash/step.yaml
    - filesystem/step.yaml
    - package/step.yaml
    - curl/step.yaml
---

# Ubuntu

## Введение

{{< include _assignment-description.qmd >}}

## Задания

### {{< meta nano.title >}}

{{< include nano/_theory.qmd >}}

{{< include nano/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta bash.title >}}

{{< include bash/_theory.qmd >}}

{{< include bash/_task.qmd >}}

{{< include bash/_solution.qmd >}}

### {{< meta filesystem.title >}}

{{< include filesystem/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta package.title >}}

{{< include package/_theory.qmd >}}

{{< include package/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta curl.title >}}

{{< include curl/_theory.qmd >}}

{{< include curl/_task.qmd >}}
